base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of score_popups_eaten_ghosts — a ui (hud_readout) from 1980 pac man. Score-popup numbers for eaten ghosts in sequence during single frightened window: 200. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Score-popup numbers for eaten ghosts in sequence during single frightened window: 200 → 400 → 800 → 1600 (doubles each ghost eaten); cyan-text
